## Checklist before merging
- [ ] All changes are grounded in real operational experience or a documented structural correction
- [ ] No change introduces a new hard gate (category wall or seasonal gate) — these are permanently rejected
- [ ] The 3-question filter is unchanged or the change makes it more accurate, not more bureaucratic
- [ ] The 11 unbreakable rules are unchanged or a rule was added with documented justification
- [ ] The CHANGELOG.md has been updated with a one-line entry for every change
- [ ] The old KB version is preserved in the `KB/` folder (never delete historical versions)
- [ ] The new KB version is referenced in the Project Instructions if relevant

## Failure library learnings included

---
*Only merge after completing a full operational cycle or correcting a structural error with documented justification.*
*Never update the KB mid-cycle — wait for cycle completion.*
